c.d: The potential number of viewers that can be reached through the platform.
The maximum supported video resolution and frame rate for live streams.
The availability of features that allow creators to earn revenue from their live streams.
The ability to simultaneously broadcast to multiple platforms.
The availability of features such as live chat, polls, and Q&A sessions.
Responsiveness and usability of the platform on mobile devices.
The intuitiveness and simplicity of the platform's interface and features.
The ability to save and store live streams for later viewing.
The availability of data and insights on viewer behavior and stream performance.
The measures taken to protect content and viewers, such as encryption and moderation tools.
